from pathlib import Path

conftest = Path\("tests/conftest.py"\).read_text\(encoding="utf-8"\)

# Check each region in MOCK_DATA_JSONS loop
regions_to_check = ["APAC", "AME", "LATAM", "MED", "NCE"]
print\("Checking if fixture iterates over all regions in data creation:"\)
print\(\)

# The actual check should be: does MOCK_DATA_JSONS have all 5 regions?
if "MOCK_DATA_JSONS = {" in conftest:
    print\("[PASS] MOCK_DATA_JSONS defined"\)
    
    # Count how many regions in the dict
    dict_section = conftest[conftest.find\("MOCK_DATA_JSONS = {"\):conftest.find\("MOCK_DATA_JSONS = {"\) + 500]
    for region in regions_to_check:
        if f'"{region}"' in conftest or f"'{region}'" in conftest:
            print\(f"  [PASS] {region} found in fixture data"\)
        else:
            print\(f"  [FAIL] {region} NOT found in fixture data"\)
    
    # Also check the loop that writes data.json
    if "for region, data in MOCK_DATA_JSONS.items\(\):" in conftest:
        print\("\\n[PASS] Fixture loops over MOCK_DATA_JSONS.items\(\)"\)
        if "\(region_dir / \\"data.json\\"\).write_text" in conftest:
            print\("[PASS] Loop writes data.json for each region"\)
    else:
        print\("\\n[FAIL] Fixture missing loop over MOCK_DATA_JSONS"\)

EOCHECK)
